summary: Results-driven Cloud Support Manager with 10+ years of experience leading large-scale technical operations and support organizations, driving operational excellence, and improving customer satisfaction, leveraging cloud platforms including Azure, AWS, and GCP, identity and security technologies, infrastructure platforms, monitoring, observability, and IT operations tooling, automation, and infrastructure as code experience.
